description_long: This is an adult male figure dressed in a formal business suit, complete with a collared shirt and tie. The suit jacket is tailored and fitted, with matching trousers and a visible shirt collar and cuffs. The figure has a full beard and mustache, and his hair is styled back into a ponytail. His arms are extended horizontally to the sides, and he is wearing formal dress shoes. The overall appearance is that of a professional individual, likely suited for an office or business environment, with realistic human proportions and details.
description: A bearded adult male in a formal business suit with a collared shirt, tie, and ponytail, standing with arms extended. The figure is detailed with dress shoes and a professional appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full suit, shirt, tie, facial hair, and ponytail, with arms extended horizontally.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, the ponytail, and the fitted nature of the suit.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the suit, the ponytail, and the symmetrical arm extension.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the side profile, ponytail, and the suit's fit along the body.
attribute_clothing_type: business suit with collared shirt and tie
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
attribute_hairstyle: long hair tied back in a ponytail
